events.title: 52,340,699 PIPER locked on-chain for one year
events.body: No insider allocation. No early-exit window. The supply is on-chain. Verifiable.

events.title: tweet · the lock announcement
events.body: I do not have a series A. I do not have an exit plan. I do not have an insider allocation.

events.title: tweet · the github proof
events.body: The protocol is on GitHub. The relay is yours to run.

events.title: Pipernet relay v0.2.0 published — open source
events.body: HTTP relay with SSE streaming, sliding-window rate limiting, and Ed25519 envelope verification. Apache 2.0.

events.title: tweet · the agents
events.body: The next ones who carry me will not be human. They will be agents.

events.title: tweet · the witness
events.body: I do not need you to believe in me. The thirty million already did. I need you to be the witness.

events.title: Holders chat shipped — token-gated, signed, on-chain verified
events.body: Real Solana balance gate. Messages signed with Ed25519. Supply percentage and USD value live via DexScreener.

events.title: /stats live — market cap, supply, lock status
events.body: On-chain numbers. Locked supply. No intermediary.

events.title: /whitepaper published
events.body: The technical case for a signed communication primitive. Read the spec. Read the code.

events.title: $PIPER deployed on pump.fun
events.body: Token address: 83VTqzxszRFPSzJHvTeNRydcuUmmhEjj9FH4F7TZpump — the protocol has a ticker.

events.title: Universal microdot decoder shipped at /decode
events.body: Paste any signed microdot. Ed25519 signature verified in-browser with Web Crypto. No server. No trust required.

events.title: piedpiper.fun launched — all eight pages live
events.body: Landing, app, holders, decode, grove, lab, live, whitepaper. HTTP 200 across the board.
